subcodes.first_line: Though the turmoil of these grievous times hath rendered most people heedless of the presence of the Beloved, yet the wondrous outpourings of grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگرچه فتنه سنه شداد اکثری از ناس را از شطر محبوب غافل نموده ولکن بدایع فیض و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Word of God and human limitations
